name: Obi
description: A boisterous young Labrador with a golden coat and boundless energy. He fixes you with intelligent amber eyes, tail wagging furiously. His collar tag reads 'Obi'. He seems to be waiting for something — or someone.
talkTemplates: Obi stares at you with his head tilted to one side, clearly delighted by the attention.
Obi responds to your words with a single, very decisive bark.
Obi wags his tail so hard his whole back end swings. He has no idea what you said, but he's thrilled you said it.
Obi licks your hand enthusiastically. Probably not the response you were looking for.
Obi sits very straight and fixes you with an attentive gaze, as though he understands every single word. He does not.
Obi's ears flatten and he lets out a soft whine, gazing up at you with enormous amber eyes.
Obi nudges your hand with his cold nose and looks up expectantly. The conversation is going well, from his perspective.
interactTemplates: Obi's head snaps up the moment {player} enters. His tail becomes a golden blur.
Obi spots {player} and immediately trots over, sniffing their boots with great enthusiasm.
Obi lets out a short, happy bark as {player} walks in, then circles them twice.
Obi lifts his head from his paws and watches {player} with bright, hopeful eyes.
Obi scrambles to his feet and presses his cold nose into {player}'s hand.
At the sight of {player}, Obi's entire back end wiggles furiously.
Obi yawns an enormous yawn, stretches, then pads over to greet {player} as if they've been gone for years.

departureTemplates: Obi's ears prick up — he sniffs the air and trots off to the {dir}.
Obi spots something interesting and bolts {dir} before you can blink.
Obi gives you an apologetic tail-wag, then pads off to the {dir}.
Obi suddenly barks at nothing in particular and disappears to the {dir}.
With a wag of his tail, Obi trots {dir} and is gone.
Obi gets distracted by something you can't see and scampers off to the {dir}.
Obi sneezes, looks embarrassed, then trots off to the {dir} with great purpose.
Something catches Obi's eye to the {dir} and he's off like a shot.
arrivalTemplates: Obi bounds in from the {from}, tongue lolling, tail spinning furiously.
A familiar golden blur skids in from the {from} — it's Obi, looking very pleased with himself.
Obi trots in from the {from} and immediately sniffs everything in sight.
Obi pads in from the {from}, ears perked, eyes bright.
Obi charges in from the {from} and nearly knocks you over in excitement.
Obi saunters in from the {from}, tail held high, acting as though he owns the place.
There's a clatter from the {from} and then Obi appears, utterly unrepentant.
